creator: makc@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to Graham Perrin from comment #0)
Right-click on the desktop, choose "Configure Desktop and Wallpaper" and look for "Stripes: FreeBSD" wallpapers. They were created for FreeBSD back in KDE SC 4 times: https://cukic.co/2010/08/12/distribution-branding-and-stripes/

I'm not sure what would you like in the package message.
